message:
test(webhook): coverage boost — toWebhookEvent branches, classifySeverity, discordColorForSeverity

Add 11 new test functions covering previously untested webhook helper branches:

bus_bridge_test.go (4 tests):
- TestToWebhookEvent_Nil: nil input returns false
- TestToWebhookEvent_WebhookEventValue: value-typed WebhookEvent succeeds with all fields
- TestToWebhookEvent_WebhookEventPointer: pointer-typed *WebhookEvent succeeds
- TestToWebhookEvent_NilPointer: nil *WebhookEvent returns false

formatters_test.go (7 tests):
- TestClassifySeverity_{Empty,Error,Warning,Success,InfoDefault}: all severity classification branches
- TestDiscordColorForSeverity_{Error,Warning,Success,Info}: color mapping per severity level

All tests use t.Parallel(). Tagged bd-1ced7.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
